name: North Lawn Edge
issue: Low staying behaviour and weak visual attraction despite good open space.
suggestion: Add shaded seating, small program nodes, and clearer pedestrian links to the northern building edge.

name: East Pocket Lawn
issue: The lawn is visible but disconnected from the dominant diagonal movement flow.
suggestion: Introduce a secondary path, movable chairs, and a small social node to turn passing movement into optional staying.

name: South Retail Edge
issue: Retail frontage has limited dwell time because seating and shade are fragmented.
suggestion: Consolidate benches, add canopy shade, and improve visual cues from the main entrance corridor.
